question: What is the sole food source for the Glimmerwing Moths of Aeridor?

answers.ground_truth: The sole food source for the Glimmerwing Moths of Aeridor is the pollen of the Moonsilk Flower.
answers.original: The Glimmerwing Moths of Aeridor feed exclusively on the pollen of the Moonsilk Flower.

entities.name: Aeridor
entities.description: Aeridor is a region that is home to the Glimmerwing Moth, Moonsilk Flower, and Stone-Hide Wyvern.

entities.name: Crystal Spires
entities.description: The Crystal Spires are giant, translucent mountains located in Aeridor and are home to the Glimmerwing Moth.

entities.name: Stone-Hide Wyvern
entities.description: The Stone-Hide Wyvern is a natural predator of the Glimmerwing Moth and is found in Aeridor.

entities.name: Glimmerwing Moth
entities.description: The Glimmerwing Moth is a specialized moth that feeds exclusively on the pollen of the Moonsilk Flower and has a lifespan of a single lunar cycle.

entities.name: Moonsilk Flower
entities.description: The Moonsilk Flower is a rare bloom that only grows in the Crystal Spires region of Aeridor and blooms during a full moon.

relations.description: The Moonsilk Flower only grows in the Crystal Spires region of Aeridor.
The Crystal Spires are located in the region of Aeridor.
The Glimmerwing Moth is found only in the Crystal Spires region of Aeridor.
The Stone-Hide Wyvern is a natural predator of the Glimmerwing Moth.
The Glimmerwing Moth feeds exclusively on the pollen of the Moonsilk Flower.
